Thanks for opening a pull request! Please read CONTRIBUTING.md if you haven't already.

If this PR fixes an issue, add "Fixes #<issue number>" on its own line below.
-->

## Summary

<!-- Brief description of what this PR changes and why. -->

## Type of change

<!-- Check the relevant option with an "x". -->

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing behavior to change)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactor / chore (no functional change)
- [ ] Other (please describe):

## Related issue

<!-- "Fixes #123" will auto-close the issue on merge. Use "Refs #123" for references. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] I have read the [Contributing guide](../CONTRIBUTING.md).
- [ ] My code follows the project's coding conventions (`gofmt -s`, `go vet`).
- [ ] I have added or updated tests to cover my changes.
- [ ] `task build`, `task test`, and `task lint` pass locally.
- [ ] I have updated `README.md` if this change adds or changes a user-facing command or flag.
- [ ] My commit messages follow the project's commit message conventions.

## Notes for reviewer

<!-- Anything you'd like the reviewer to pay attention to, context, or follow-up work. -->
